violations.text: Wall in back storage area was in poor repair, observed hole with exposed installation and sheetrock. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the retail shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024
The back storage room has an accumulation of empty boxes and trash debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back storeroom, is not tight-fitting. Inspector observed a gap at the time of inspection. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
The back storage room has an accumulation of empty boxes and trash debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024
